metadata.title: Synaply - Jifunze Msamiati kwa kutumia AI na Marudio ya Kupanga
metadata.description: Boresha ujuzi wako wa lugha kwa marudio ya kupanga yanayoendeshwa na AI. Unda orodha za maneno unazotaka au jifunze kutoka kwa orodha za umma zilizoshirikiwa na jamii.
metadata.keywords: jifunze kiingereza, marudio ya kupanga, mjenzi wa msamiati, kadi za kumbukumbu, mafunzo ya lugha ya AI, orodha za maneno, programu ya kusoma lugha, jifunze kihispania, jifunze kifaransa, jifunze kijerumani, ubingwa wa lugha, kariri maneno, mafunzo ya SRS
metadata.og_title: Synaply - Mafunzo ya Msamiati ya Akili
metadata.og_description: Boresha ujuzi wako wa lugha kwa marudio ya kupanga yanayoendeshwa na AI. Jifunze haraka, kumbuka kwa muda mrefu.
metadata.og_image_alt: Kiolesura cha Programu ya Mafunzo ya Lugha ya Synaply AI
metadata.twitter_title: Synaply - Jifunze Maneno Mapya Bila Juhudi
metadata.twitter_description: Jiunge na Synaply ili kupanua msamiati wako kwa kutumia marudio ya kupanga ya akili na AI.

common.title: Kichwa
common.footer_help_text: Help us improve! Share your ideas, report bugs, or request features:

dashboard.title: Dashibodi
dashboard.subtitle: Kujifunze {target} kutoka {source}
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Gundua orodha za maneno za umma na orodha za kucheza kutoka kwa watumiaji wengine.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Boresha msamiati wako kwa kutafsiri sentensi zilizozalishwa na AI kulingana na mada yoyote au orodha yako ya maneno.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Tazama, tafuta, hariri au futa maneno kutoka kwa mkusanyiko wako.
dashboard.import_error_retry: Hatukuweza kuhifadhi neno lako jipya. Hebu tujaribu mara moja zaidi!
dashboard.select_topic_error: Tafadhali chagua mada au ingiza muktadha wako mwenewe.
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: AI itasaidia kwa ufafanuzi na sentensi ya mfano
dashboard.delete_confirm: Je, una uhakika unataka kufuta neno hili?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: Je, una uhakika unataka kufuta maneno yako YOTE? Hatua hii haiwezi kutenguliwa.
dashboard.no_words_found: Hakuna maneno yaliyopatikana. Jaribu neno tofauti la utafutaji au ongeza baadhi ya maneno!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Hakuna maneno yaliyopatikana ya kusoma. Tafadhali ongeza maneno mapya kwenye orodha yako kwanza!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Huna maneno ya kupitia leo. Rudi baadaye au ongeza maneno mapya!
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Kazi nzuri! Umepitia maneno yako ya leo.
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Ingiza mada ili kuzalisha sentensi za mazoezi zilizoundwa kwa ajili yako tu!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Kuiacha tupu kutazalisha sentensi kulingana na msamiati wako.
dashboard.footer_help_text: Tusaidie kuboresha! Shiriki mawazo yako, ripoti hitilafu, au omba vipengele:
dashboard.support_desc: Ikiwa unapenda programu hii, unaweza kusaidia maendeleo yake.

onboarding.journey_begins: Safari yako ya ubingwa wa lugha inaanza hapa.
onboarding.strategy_desc: Ili kupata manufaa zaidi kutoka kwa Synaply, tunapendekeza mkakati huu rahisi:
onboarding.step1_desc: Ongeza karibu maneno 100 yanayohusiana na mada moja (k.m., Biashara au Usafiri) ili kujenga muktadha thabiti.
onboarding.step2_desc: Mudu maneno haya kupitia marudio ya kila siku hadi yawe sehemu ya msamiati wako.
onboarding.step3_desc: Badili hadi Mazoezi ya AI ili kutumia msamiati wako mpya katika sentensi kamili na hali halisi za ulimwengu.

dashboard.generate_ai_title: Zalisha Orodha ya Maneno kwa kutumia AI
dashboard.custom_topic_placeholder: k.m. Maneno ya mkutano wa biashara kuhusu masoko
dashboard.publish_desc: Shiriki mkusanyiko huu wa maneno {count} na watumiaji wengine. Itaonekana kwenye matunzio ya Orodha za Umma.
dashboard.publish_success: Orodha ya maneno imechapishwa kwa mafanikio!
dashboard.inline_add_error: Tafadhali toa neno asili na tafsiri zote mbili
dashboard.save_batch_success: Imefanikiwa kuhifadhi maneno {count} kwenye orodha yako!
dashboard.save_batch_error: Imeshindwa kuhifadhi maneno. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_error: Tafadhali ondoa maneno yanayojirudia kabla ya kuhifadhi.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_publish_error: Tafadhali ondoa maneno yanayojirudia kabla ya kuchapisha.

topics.home: Nyumbani na Maisha ya Kila Siku

ai_word_info.error_coffee_break: AI inapata mapumziko ya haraka ya kahawa. Tafadhali jaribu tena baada ya muda mfupi!
ai_word_info.error_generic: Oi! Hatukuweza kupata maarifa ya AI. Hebu tujaribu tena!

public_lists.title: Orodha za Maneno za Umma
public_lists.subtitle: Gundua orodha za maneno zilizoundwa na watumiaji wengine kwa lugha zako.
public_lists.search_placeholder: Tafuta orodha kwa kichwa au maelezo...
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Jaribu utafutaji tofauti au ubadilishe vichujio vyako vya lugha.
public_lists.load_error: Hatukuweza kupakia orodha za umma hivi sasa.

playlists_detail.title: Maelezo ya Orodha ya kucheza
playlists_detail.collections_in_playlist: Makusanyo katika orodha hii ya kucheza

detail.title: Maelezo ya Orodha
detail.added_success: Maneno yameongezwa kwa mafanikio kwenye mkusanyiko wako!
detail.added_error: Imeshindwa kuongeza maneno kwenye mkusanyiko wako.
detail.delete_confirm: Je, una uhakika unataka kufuta orodha hii ya umma? Hatua hii haiwezi kutenguliwa.
detail.duplicate_error: Kuna maneno yanayojirudia kwenye orodha. Tafadhali yaondoe kabla ya kuhifadhi.

profile.terms_welcome: Karibu kwenye Synaply. Kwa kutumia huduma zetu, unakubaliana na masharti haya...
profile.title: Mipangilio ya Wasifu
profile.leave_empty: Acha tupu ili kuweka nywila ya sasa
profile.subtitle: Dhibiti taarifa zako za kibinafsi na mipangilio ya lugha
profile.terms_beta_warning: Important Beta Notice: Synaply is currently in its beta testing phase. By using this service, you acknowledge that you are participating in a testing period and understand the risks associated with pre-release software.
profile.terms_intro_text: By accessing or using Synaply, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
profile.terms_beta_text: Synaply is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis for beta testing purposes. You explicitly acknowledge and agree that: (a) The service may contain bugs, errors, and experience frequent interruptions. (b) We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time without notice. (c) CRITICAL: During the beta period, we may perform database resets or deletions. This means all your data, including progress, word lists, and account information, may be permanently deleted without prior warning. You are responsible for maintaining your own backups of any important data.
profile.terms_accounts_text: To use certain features, you must register for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
profile.terms_content_text: Our service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, or other material. You are responsible for the content you post. Synaply retains all rights to its original content, features, and functionality, which are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
profile.terms_conduct_text: You agree not to use the service for any unlawful purpose or to solicit others to perform or participate in any unlawful acts. You shall not attempt to interfere with the proper working of the service, including through viruses, denial of service attacks, or any other harmful technology.
profile.terms_liability_text: In no event shall Synaply, nor its directors, employees, partners, or agents, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the service.
profile.terms_changes_text: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. We will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect for significant changes. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
profile.terms_contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us through the support channels provided on the website.

best_practice.title: Mazoezi Bora kwa Mafanikio
best_practice.strategy_desc: Kwa matumizi bora ya kujifunza, tunapendekeza mkakati huu rahisi wa hatua 3:
best_practice.step1_desc: Ongeza karibu maneno 100 ukizingatia mada moja (k.m., Usafiri au Biashara) ili kuunda muktadha.
best_practice.step2_desc: Mudu maneno haya kupitia marudio ya kila siku hadi yawe sehemu ya msamiati wako.
best_practice.step3_desc: Badili hadi Mazoezi ya AI ili kutumia msamiati wako mpya katika sentensi kamili na muktadha wa ulimwengu halisi.

getting_started.title: Kuanza
getting_started.desc: Synaply ni chombo chenye nguvu kilichoundwa kukusaidia kupanua msamiati wako na kuboresha ujuzi wako wa lugha kwa kutumia marudio ya kupanga na akili mnemba (AI).
getting_started.step1_desc: Ongeza maneno mwenyewe au tumia AI kuzalisha orodha kulingana na mada na viwango.
getting_started.step2_title: Hatua ya 2: Mazoezi ya Kila Siku
getting_started.step2_desc: Tumia Mapitio ya Msamiati kukariri maneno ukitumia algoriti ya FSRS.

manual.title: Uingizaji wa Mwenyewe
manual.desc: Ingiza neno katika lugha unayojifunza na tafsiri yake. Unaweza kuongeza maoni au muktadha kwa ajili ya kukariri vizuri zaidi.

auto_translate.title: Tafsiri-otomatiki
auto_translate.desc: Tumia kipengele cha "Tafsiri-otomatiki" kwa ajili ya tafsiri ya papo hapo kupitia huduma ya DeepL.

ai_list.title: Uzalishaji wa Orodha (Orodha ya Maneno ya AI)
ai_list.desc: Chagua kiwango (A1-C2) na mada, na AI (Gemini) itakuandalia orodha ya maneno yanayohusiana, ambayo yanaweza kuongezwa kwenye kamusi yako kwa mbofyo mmoja.

ai_insights.title: Maarifa ya AI
ai_insights.desc: Kwa kila neno, AI inaweza kutoa visawe, mifano ya matumizi, na vidokezo vya kisarufi.

spaced_repetition.title: Marudio ya Kupanga
spaced_repetition.desc: Synaply hutumia algoriti ya FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) kuhesabu muda bora wa kurudia kila neno.
spaced_repetition.step2: Ingiza tafsiri na ubonyeze Enter au Angalia Jibu.
spaced_repetition.step3: Ikiwa hukumbuki — bofya "Sikumbuki" ili kuona jibu.
spaced_repetition.step4: Algoriti itahesabu tena tarehe inayofuata ya mapitio kulingana na jibu lako.

ai_practice.title: Mazoezi ya AI: Tafsiri ya Sentensi
ai_practice.desc: Kipengele hiki husaidia kufundisha sarufi na muktadha kwa kutafsiri sentensi nzima zilizotungwa na AI mahususi kwa ajili yako.
ai_practice.step2: AI itazalisha sentensi 5 kuhusu mada iliyochaguliwa.
ai_practice.step3: Wasilisha tafsiri yako na upokee uchambuzi wa kina.
ai_practice.step4: AI itafafanua makosa na kupendekeza tafsiri bora na maelezo.

dictionary_management.title: Usimamizi wa Kamusi
dictionary_management.search: Tafuta: Tumia upau wa utafutaji ili kupata maneno haraka katika mkusanyiko wako.
dictionary_management.sorting: Kupanga: Tazama orodha ya maneno yako yote na chaguo la kuyafuta.
dictionary_management.delete_all: Futa maneno yote: Uwezo wa kufuta kabisa kamusi yako kwa mbofyo mmoja.

progress.title: Maendeleo na Alama
progress.desc: Alama yako (kwenye kichwa cha programu) inaonyesha idadi ya maneno yaliyotafsiriwa kwa usahihi. Kadiri alama inavyokuwa juu, ndivyo maneno mengi unayokuwa umeyamudu kwa mafanikio!

not_authorized_admin: You do not have administrator permissions to view this page.
